name: Aurora Recreation Community Center
description: Aurora Recreation Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Aurora, IN. There are 3 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Bright Christian Church
description: Come play pickleball at Bright Christian Church in Lawrenceburg, IN! You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Greendale Park
description: Greendale Park is a place to play pickleball in Greendale, IN. There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The court is free.

name: Hidden Valley Lake
description: Come play pickleball at Hidden Valley Lake in Lawrenceburg, IN! There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.

name: Lawrenceburg Community Center
description: Lawrenceburg Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Lawrenceburg, IN. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.
